info.description: Search, canonical, social sharing, and structured-data settings for this entry.

metaTitle.description: Title shown in search results. Aim for 50–60 characters.

metaDescription.description: Summary shown in search results. Aim for 150–160 characters.

canonicalUrl.description: Optional preferred absolute URL, for example https://www.niagarat.com/blog/example-post.

openGraphTitle.description: Optional title used when this page is shared on social media.

openGraphDescription.description: Optional social sharing description. Aim for 110–200 characters.

openGraphImage.description: Social sharing image. Recommended size: 1200 × 630 pixels.

enableArticleSchema.description: For blog posts only: automatically create Article schema from the entry.

jsonLd.description: Optional valid JSON-LD object. Do not paste script tags. Use only when custom schema is needed.
